en.title: Best Tablets of 2026: Expert-Tested & Ranked
en.description: The top tablets of 2026 ranked on performance, display, software, and value, from the do-everything iPad Air M4 and 14.6-inch Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra to the OnePlus Pad 3 and budget picks under $300.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳平板電腦排行榜：實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年平板電腦推薦，從什麼都能做的 iPad Air M4、14.6 吋巨屏 Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra，到性價比破表的 OnePlus Pad 3 與萬元有找的入門款，依效能、螢幕、生態、續航完整評比。

en.description: The best tablet for most people in 2026, pairing the fast M4 chip and 12GB of RAM with the most mature tablet app library, in 11-inch and 13-inch sizes.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年最多人該買的那一台，M4 晶片配 12GB 記憶體，跑什麼都順，加上目前最成熟的平板 App 生態，11 吋跟 13 吋兩種尺寸任你挑。

en.description: The creator's flagship, with a tandem OLED Ultra Retina XDR display, the M5 chip, and Thunderbolt that turns it into a real video-editing and drawing machine.

zh-tw.description: 創作者旗艦，雙層 OLED Ultra Retina XDR 螢幕配 M5 晶片，還有 Thunderbolt 高速埠，剪片、繪圖直接當主力機在用都沒問題。

en.description: The best Android tablet money can buy, with a vast 14.6-inch AMOLED screen, the bundled S Pen, and DeX desktop mode for a genuine laptop replacement.

zh-tw.description: 錢能買到最強的 Android 平板，14.6 吋 AMOLED 大屏看了會回不去，附 S Pen，還有 DeX 桌面模式，真的能拿來取代筆電辦公。

en.description: The Android value champion, with a Snapdragon 8 Elite, a 13.2-inch 3.4K 144Hz screen, a 12,140mAh battery that runs 16 hours, and 80W fast charging.

zh-tw.description: Android 性價比王者，Snapdragon 8 Elite 配 13.2 吋 3.4K 144Hz 螢幕，12,140mAh 大電池實測能跑 16 小時，還有 80W 快充，這配置開這價真的香。

en.description: The best compact tablet, an 8.3-inch slab that slips into a jacket pocket while still running the full iPadOS app catalog and Apple Pencil Pro.

zh-tw.description: 最強小尺寸平板，8.3 吋外套口袋就塞得下，卻能跑完整 iPadOS App，還支援 Apple Pencil Pro，通勤捷運上單手追劇看漫畫剛剛好。

en.description: The mainstream Android pick, with a bright 11-inch 120Hz AMOLED panel, quad speakers, the included S Pen, and DeX, for a lighter take on the Ultra.

zh-tw.description: Android 主流之選，11 吋 120Hz AMOLED 螢幕亮度夠，四喇叭追劇很爽，一樣附 S Pen 跟 DeX，想要 Ultra 的體驗但機身輕一點選它。

en.description: The best budget iPad, an 11-inch tablet with the A16 chip, 128GB of base storage, and the same clean iPadOS experience for streaming, notes, and browsing.

zh-tw.description: 最划算的入門 iPad，11 吋螢幕配 A16 晶片，基本款就給 128GB，追劇、記筆記、上網都順，第一台 iPad 買它最不會後悔。

en.description: The mid-range student pick, with Open Canvas multitasking, a 7:5 aspect ratio that suits documents, and all-day battery, at a price that undercuts the iPad Air.

zh-tw.description: 中階學生機首選，Open Canvas 多工分割好用，7:5 比例看文件不卡手，續航一整天沒問題，預算卡在 iPad Air 之下的找它就對了。

en.description: The high-value Android entry, with a Snapdragon 8 Elite, an 11.2-inch 144Hz display, and a laptop-style productivity push, all well below flagship pricing.

zh-tw.description: 高性價比 Android 入門，Snapdragon 8 Elite 配 11.2 吋 144Hz 螢幕，主打筆電化生產力，價格卻壓在旗艦之下，規格控會覺得很值。

en.description: The ultra-budget streaming slate, with a vivid 11-inch display, 14-hour battery, and optional keyboard, built for Prime Video, reading, and kids.

zh-tw.description: 超預算追劇平板，11 吋螢幕夠鮮豔，續航 14 小時，鍵盤可加購，拿來看 Prime Video、看書、給小孩用最對味，便宜耐操。

references.title: The best tablet 2026: the best iPad and Android tablets
Best Tablet 2026: iPads & Android Tablets Reviewed & Ranked
The best tablets in 2026 for all budgets and uses

en.commentary:
The tablet question in 2026 is really a question about your wallet and your existing gadgets, and for the widest range of people the iPad Air M4 is the right answer. It runs the M4 chip with 12GB of RAM, sits in the most mature tablet software ecosystem on the planet, and now comes in both 11-inch and 13-inch sizes so you can pick portable or expansive. At $599 it delivers flagship-grade speed and the best app library for a price most buyers will actually pay, which is exactly why it holds my top spot over its own pricier sibling.

The iPad Pro M5 at rank 2 is the more capable machine, and I rank it just below the Air on purpose. Its tandem-OLED Ultra Retina XDR display and M5 chip make it the tablet I reach for to edit video and draw professionally, and the Thunderbolt port gives it desktop-class expansion. For most people that power is more than they need, so the Pro earns its place as the creator's choice rather than the default pick.

The Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra at rank 3 is the best Android tablet I have tested, full stop. The 14.6-inch AMOLED is the most immersive screen in the category, the S Pen comes in the box, and DeX turns it into a credible laptop stand-in. The OnePlus Pad 3 at rank 4 is the value story of the year, delivering a Snapdragon 8 Elite, a 144Hz 3.4K screen, and 16 hours of battery for $699, and it earned a 9/10 from Android Authority for good reason.

Further down, the iPad mini A17 Pro owns the compact niche, the Galaxy Tab S11 brings the Ultra experience in a lighter body, and the iPad A16 at $349 is the budget gateway I recommend to first-time buyers. The OnePlus Pad Go 2 and Xiaomi Pad 8 Pro fight hard in the mid-range, and the Amazon Fire Max 11 closes the list as the streaming-and-kids slate that costs less than a nice dinner out. Pick your ecosystem first, then your size, and this list points you to the right slab.

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 Is the Right Call for Most Buyers
highlights.body: The M4 chip, 12GB of RAM, and the most mature tablet app library combine in a $599 package that handles everything from note-taking to light video work. It offers flagship speed at a mainstream price, which is why it outranks the pricier iPad Pro for general buyers.

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 Is the Tablet for Creators
highlights.body: Its tandem-OLED Ultra Retina XDR display, M5 chip, and Thunderbolt port make it a genuine video-editing and professional-drawing machine. That capability is overkill for casual use, so it earns the number two spot as the deliberate creator's choice.

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 Delivers the Best Android Value
highlights.body: A Snapdragon 8 Elite, a 13.2-inch 3.4K 144Hz screen, 16-hour battery life, and 80W charging for $699 is a stacked spec sheet. It scored 9/10 at Android Authority and outlasts the iPad Air on battery, making it the standout buy for Android fans.

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra Wins the Android Crown
highlights.body: The 14.6-inch AMOLED is the most immersive panel in the category, the S Pen ships in the box, and DeX desktop mode turns it into a real laptop alternative. For anyone who wants the most tablet Android can offer, this is the one to buy.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年要買哪台平板，講白了就是看你的預算跟你手上已經有哪些 3C，而對最廣大的族群來說，iPad Air M4 就是那個正確答案。它搭 M4 晶片配 12GB 記憶體，活在全世界最成熟的平板軟體生態裡，現在還有 11 吋跟 13 吋兩種尺寸，要輕便還是要大畫面自己挑。$599 的價格給你旗艦級速度跟最好的 App 庫，而且是多數人真的會掏錢的價位，這就是它壓過自家更貴兄弟、穩坐我心中第一的原因。

第二名的 iPad Pro M5 是更強的機器，我故意把它排在 Air 後面。它的雙層 OLED Ultra Retina XDR 螢幕配 M5 晶片，是我要剪片、專業繪圖時會拿起來的那一台，Thunderbolt 埠還給它桌機等級的擴充力。但對多數人來說那效能根本用不完，所以 Pro 的定位是創作者之選，而不是大眾預設首選。

第三名的 Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 是我測過最強的 Android 平板，沒有之一。14.6 吋 AMOLED 是這個品類最沉浸的螢幕，S Pen 直接附在盒裡，DeX 一開就是堪用的筆電替身。第四名的 OnePlus Pad 3 則是今年的性價比故事，Snapdragon 8 Elite 配 144Hz 3.4K 螢幕，續航 16 小時只賣 $699，Android Authority 給它 9/10 是有道理的。

再往下，iPad mini A17 Pro 穩坐小尺寸王座，Galaxy Tab S11 用更輕的機身給你 Ultra 的體驗，$349 的 iPad A16 則是我會推給第一次買平板的人的入門門票。OnePlus Pad Go 2 跟 Xiaomi Pad 8 Pro 在中階廝殺得很兇，Amazon Fire Max 11 收尾，是一台比上館子吃頓好料還便宜的追劇兼兒童平板。先選生態系，再選尺寸，這張榜單就能帶你找到對的那一台。

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 是多數人最該買的那一台
highlights.body: M4 晶片、12GB 記憶體加上最成熟的平板 App 庫，全包在 $599 的機身裡，從記筆記到輕量剪片都接得住。它用大眾價格給你旗艦速度，這就是它在一般買家心中贏過更貴 iPad Pro 的原因。

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 是創作者的平板
highlights.body: 雙層 OLED Ultra Retina XDR 螢幕、M5 晶片加 Thunderbolt 埠，讓它成為真正能剪片、專業繪圖的機器。這等級效能對一般用途是過頭了，所以它穩居第二，是刻意留給創作者的選擇。

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 給出最強 Android 性價比
highlights.body: Snapdragon 8 Elite、13.2 吋 3.4K 144Hz 螢幕、16 小時續航加 80W 快充，只要 $699，這規格表堆得很滿。Android Authority 給它 9/10，續航還贏過 iPad Air，是 Android 陣營最突出的一台。

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 奪下 Android 王冠
highlights.body: 14.6 吋 AMOLED 是這個品類最沉浸的面板，S Pen 直接附盒，DeX 桌面模式讓它變成真正的筆電替身。想要 Android 平板能給的最高規格，買這台就對了。

references.title: The best tablet 2026: the best iPad and Android tablets from Apple, OnePlus, Samsung and more
We've tested the best tablets in 2026 for all budgets and uses

en.commentary: The iPad Air M4 stays my pick for most people heading into June 2026, and the reasoning has not changed: it pairs a desktop-class M4 chip and 12GB of RAM with a price that undercuts the Pro, so it flies through editing, gaming and heavy multitasking without making you pay flagship money. The iPad Pro M5 sits just behind it at rank two because it is the better tablet on paper, the tandem OLED display is gorgeous, but the value math keeps the Air on top. On the Android side the Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra holds rank three on the strength of that 14.6-inch 2.9K AMOLED panel, which genuinely lets it work like a small laptop when you dock the keyboard. The story to watch is Samsung reviving the plus-sized model: a Galaxy Tab S12 Plus is rumored to bring a big screen and battery at a lower price than the Ultra, and if it lands it slots right into the gap above the mid-range. The OnePlus Pad 3 stays the fastest Android tablet here at rank four thanks to its Snapdragon 8 Elite chip and excellent battery life. Nothing in my searches this week justified moving anyone, so the order carries forward. If you want a tablet today, the iPad Air M4 is still the safest spend, and Android buyers who want a laptop replacement should look hard at the Tab S11 Ultra.

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 is the pick for most
highlights.body: An M4 chip and 12GB of RAM at a sub-Pro price means it handles editing, gaming and multitasking smoothly. The value keeps it at number one.

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 is the spec champion
highlights.body: The tandem OLED display is stunning and performance is the best in class, but the premium keeps it at rank two behind the better-value Air.

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra is the Android laptop replacement
highlights.body: Its 14.6-inch 2.9K AMOLED panel and keyboard dock let it stand in for a small laptop, which earns it the top Android slot at rank three.

highlights.title: A Galaxy Tab S12 Plus is rumored
highlights.body: Samsung is expected to revive the plus-sized model with a large screen and battery below Ultra pricing. It would slot in above the mid-range if it ships.

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 is the fastest Android tablet
highlights.body: Snapdragon 8 Elite power and long battery life keep it at rank four as the value-focused Android performance pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 進到 2026 年 6 月，iPad Air M4 還是我給大多數人的首選，理由沒變：桌機等級的 M4 晶片配 12GB RAM，價格又壓在 Pro 之下，剪片、玩遊戲、開一堆 App 多工都順，不用花到旗艦的錢。iPad Pro M5 緊跟在第二，規格上它確實更強，雙層 OLED 螢幕真的漂亮，但算 CP 值 Air 還是贏。Android 這邊，Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 穩坐第三，靠的是那塊 14.6 吋 2.9K AMOLED 面板，接上鍵盤真的能當小筆電用。接下來最值得盯的是三星要復活 Plus 尺寸：傳聞中的 Galaxy Tab S12 Plus 會帶來大螢幕跟大電池，價格又比 Ultra 低，真的出的話剛好補上中階以上那個空缺。OnePlus Pad 3 維持第四，是這裡最快的 Android 平板，Snapdragon 8 Elite 配上很猛的續航。這週我查到的消息都不足以動到任何人的排名，所以順序照舊。想今天就買的話，iPad Air M4 還是最安心的選擇；想用平板取代筆電的 Android 用戶，認真看一下 Tab S11 Ultra。

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 是多數人首選
highlights.body: M4 晶片配 12GB RAM，價格又在 Pro 之下，剪片、遊戲、多工都順。CP 值讓它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 是規格王
highlights.body: 雙層 OLED 螢幕很驚豔，效能也是同級最強，但貴一截，第二名輸給更划算的 Air。

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 能當筆電用
highlights.body: 14.6 吋 2.9K AMOLED 面板加鍵盤底座，真的能取代小筆電，所以拿下 Android 第一、總榜第三。

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S12 Plus 有傳聞
highlights.body: 三星預計復活 Plus 尺寸，大螢幕大電池又比 Ultra 便宜。真的出貨會卡進中階以上的位置。

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 是最快 Android 平板
highlights.body: Snapdragon 8 Elite 加上長續航，第四名穩穩的，是重效能又顧荷包的 Android 選擇。

references.title: Best Android Tablet 2026: Samsung, Google, OnePlus & More
We've tested the best tablets in 2026 for all budgets and uses

en.commentary: My tablet board in June leads with the iPad Air (M4), and I stand by that over the more powerful Pro because the Air is the one most people should actually buy. It carries the same iPadOS app ecosystem that nobody on Android can match, runs every creative app smoothly, and lands at a price that makes the Pro feel like overkill for anyone who is not editing ProRes or running pro audio. The iPad Pro (M5) holds second as the most powerful tablet on the planet, with a display that is simply the best in the category and almost 13 hours of real battery in testing. If raw power and that tandem OLED screen are worth the premium to you, it is the obvious step up. The Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra stays third as the biggest and best Galaxy Tab ever, with a 14.6-inch screen and an 11,600mAh battery that make it the large-canvas Android pick. The OnePlus Pad 3 holds fourth and earns it as the value standout, pairing the Snapdragon 8 Elite with a 144Hz display and battery life that genuinely beats the field at its price. The iPad mini, Galaxy Tab S11 and the budget slates carry forward. Nothing this week moved the order. Buy the Air for most people, the Pro for power, the OnePlus Pad 3 for value.

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 is the tablet most people should buy
highlights.body: It runs the iPadOS app ecosystem Android cannot match, handles every creative app smoothly, and costs far less than the Pro. For the vast majority of buyers it is the right call, so it stays number one.

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 is the power ceiling
highlights.body: It is the most powerful tablet on the planet with the best display in the category and nearly 13 hours of real battery. If you edit ProRes or run pro audio, the premium is worth it, and it holds a clear second.

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra owns the big canvas
highlights.body: Its 14.6-inch screen and 11,600mAh battery make it the biggest and best Galaxy Tab ever. For Android users who want maximum drawing and multitasking real estate, it stays the large-format pick at third.

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 is the value standout
highlights.body: It pairs the Snapdragon 8 Elite with a 144Hz display and battery life that beats rivals at its price. For buyers who want flagship speed without the Apple or Samsung premium, it holds a deserved fourth.

zh-tw.commentary: 6 月我的平板榜由 iPad Air（M4）領軍，我堅持把它放在效能更猛的 Pro 前面，因為 Air 才是多數人真正該買的那台。它有同樣的 iPadOS App 生態，這點 Android 沒人比得上，每個創作 App 都跑得順，價格又讓 Pro 對那些不是在剪 ProRes 或跑專業音訊的人顯得過剩。iPad Pro（M5）守第二，是地表最強的平板，螢幕就是這個類別最好的，實測續航將近 13 小時。如果純效能跟那塊雙層 OLED 螢幕對你值得多花錢，它就是明顯的升級選擇。Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 守第三，是史上最大最強的 Galaxy Tab，14.6 吋螢幕加 11,600mAh 電池，是大畫布的 Android 首選。OnePlus Pad 3 守第四，當之無愧是性價比之星，Snapdragon 8 Elite 配 144Hz 螢幕，續航在同價位真的贏過全場。iPad mini、Galaxy Tab S11 跟入門平板全部照舊。這週沒事件動排名。多數人買 Air，要效能買 Pro，要性價比買 OnePlus Pad 3。

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 是多數人該買的平板
highlights.body: 它有 Android 比不上的 iPadOS App 生態，每個創作 App 都跑得順，價格又比 Pro 低一截。對絕大多數買家來說它就是正解，所以第一是它。

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 是效能天花板
highlights.body: 它是地表最強平板，螢幕是類別最好，實測續航近 13 小時。剪 ProRes 或跑專業音訊的人，這個溢價值得，它穩坐第二。

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 主宰大畫布
highlights.body: 14.6 吋螢幕加 11,600mAh 電池，是史上最大最強的 Galaxy Tab。想要最大繪圖跟多工空間的 Android 使用者，它穩坐第三的大尺寸選擇。

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 是性價比之星
highlights.body: Snapdragon 8 Elite 配 144Hz 螢幕，續航在同價位贏過對手。想要旗艦速度又不想付蘋果三星溢價的人，它穩坐第四實至名歸。

references.title: Best tablets 2026: top iPads and Android slates tested
Best Tablet 2026 reviews

en.commentary: The iPad Air M4 stays at number one because it is the tablet that gets the value math right. It runs the same apps and nearly the same speed as the Pro, takes the same accessories, and costs meaningfully less, so for the vast majority of people it is the correct iPad to buy. I keep it on top precisely because most buyers do not need the Pro. The iPad Pro M5 holds second as the ceiling, the tablet to buy if you drive a creative workflow that actually taps the extra GPU, the better display and the ProMotion panel. For everyone else it is more than they will use. The Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra stays third as the best Android slate and the only real choice if you want a giant screen and DeX desktop mode, a genuinely different proposition from the iPad. The OnePlus Pad 3 holds fourth as the value Android pick, and the iPad mini A17 Pro rounds out the visible top for people who want a small powerful tablet. Nothing this week moved the order. The buying logic stays simple: Air for most, Pro for creators, Tab S11 Ultra for big-screen Android.

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 gets the value math right
highlights.body: Same apps, nearly Pro speed, same accessories, meaningfully lower price. For the vast majority of buyers it is the correct iPad, which is exactly why it holds number one over the more expensive Pro.

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 is the creative ceiling
highlights.body: Buy it if your workflow actually taps the extra GPU, the better display and ProMotion. For everyone else it is more tablet than they will use, so it holds a clear second behind the Air.

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra owns big-screen Android
highlights.body: It is the only real choice for a giant screen with DeX desktop mode, a genuinely different proposition from any iPad. That distinct strength keeps it the top Android slate at third.

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 is the value Android pick
highlights.body: It delivers strong performance and a big bright screen for noticeably less than the Galaxy. For Android buyers who want most of the experience on a budget, it stays the smart choice at fourth.

zh-tw.commentary: iPad Air M4 我還是放第一，因為它把性價比的算術算對了。它跑一樣的 App、速度幾乎跟 Pro 一樣、配件通用，價格卻明顯更低，對絕大多數人來說它就是該買的 iPad。我把它放頂端，正是因為多數人根本不需要 Pro。iPad Pro M5 守第二，是天花板，如果你的創作工作流真的用得到多出來的 GPU、更好的螢幕跟 ProMotion 才買它，其他人用不到那麼多。Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 守第三，是最佳 Android 平板，想要巨大螢幕跟 DeX 桌面模式它是唯一真選擇，跟 iPad 是完全不同的提案。OnePlus Pad 3 守第四，是性價比 Android 選擇，iPad mini A17 Pro 收尾可見前段，給想要小而強平板的人。這週沒有事件改變順序。買法很簡單：多數人選 Air、創作者選 Pro、要大螢幕 Android 選 Tab S11 Ultra。

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 把性價比算對了
highlights.body: 一樣的 App、幾乎 Pro 的速度、通用配件、明顯更低的價格。對絕大多數買家它就是該買的 iPad，這正是它壓過更貴的 Pro、守住第一的原因。

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 是創作天花板
highlights.body: 工作流真的用得到多出來的 GPU、更好的螢幕跟 ProMotion 才買它。其他人用不到那麼多，所以它穩居 Air 之後的第二。

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 主宰大螢幕 Android
highlights.body: 想要巨大螢幕加 DeX 桌面模式它是唯一真選擇，跟任何 iPad 都是不同提案。這份獨特優勢讓它穩坐 Android 平板第三。

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 是性價比 Android 選擇
highlights.body: 它用明顯更低的價格給出強效能跟又大又亮的螢幕。想要大部分體驗又預算有限的 Android 買家，它穩坐第四當聰明選擇。

references.title: The best tablet 2026: the best iPad and Android tablets from Apple, OnePlus, Samsung and more
We've tested the best tablets in 2026 for all budgets and uses

en.commentary: The iPad Air M4 stays at number one because it nails the value equation better than anything else here. It runs the same App Store, takes the same Pencil Pro and Magic Keyboard, and posts speeds within a hair of the Pro, yet it costs hundreds less. TechRadar this week again calls it the best tablet for most people, and I agree: the M4 and 12GB of RAM handle gaming, multi-window work, and 4K video edits without flinching, so most buyers never feel a ceiling. The iPad Pro M5 holds second as the creator's flagship. Its tandem OLED Ultra Retina XDR panel and Thunderbolt port make it a genuine portable editing and drawing station, and if you push Final Cut or Procreate hard every day, the premium is justified. The Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra remains the Android leader at third. Its 14.6-inch AMOLED is the most immersive screen in the lineup, the S Pen ships in the box, and DeX turns it into a credible laptop stand-in for spreadsheet and email days. The OnePlus Pad 3 is the value story I keep recommending at fourth. A Snapdragon 8 Elite, a 13.2-inch 144Hz panel, and a 12,140mAh battery that genuinely runs past 16 hours deliver flagship feel at a mid-tier price. Reviewers reinforced the same theme I keep coming back to this cycle: pick the ecosystem you already live in. Apple-household buyers want an iPad, Samsung-phone owners should stay on a Galaxy slate, and value hunters who do not care about the badge get the most raw hardware from OnePlus. Nothing shifted enough this week to move ranks, so the order holds.

highlights.title: The iPad Air M4 is still the smart-money buy
highlights.body: It shares the Pro's apps, Pencil Pro, and Magic Keyboard while costing hundreds less. With the M4 and 12GB of RAM, gaming, multitasking, and 4K edits all run smoothly, so most people never hit a wall.

highlights.title: The iPad Pro M5 earns its premium for creators
highlights.body: The tandem OLED Ultra Retina XDR display plus Thunderbolt make it a real portable editing and drawing rig. If you live in Final Cut or Procreate daily, the extra spend pays for itself.

highlights.title: The Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra is the Android tablet to beat
highlights.body: Its 14.6-inch AMOLED is the most immersive panel here, the S Pen is included, and DeX desktop mode genuinely replaces a laptop for spreadsheet and email work.

highlights.title: The OnePlus Pad 3 delivers flagship feel at a mid-tier price
highlights.body: A Snapdragon 8 Elite, a 13.2-inch 144Hz screen, and a 12,140mAh battery that runs past 16 hours give you premium hardware for hundreds less than the big names.

highlights.title: Buy for the ecosystem you already use
highlights.body: Apple-household buyers want an iPad, Samsung-phone owners should stay on Galaxy, and badge-agnostic value hunters get the most hardware per dollar from OnePlus. That logic kept ranks steady this week.

zh-tw.commentary: iPad Air M4 這禮拜還是穩穩坐第一，原因很單純，它把 CP 值算得最漂亮。它跑同一個 App Store，能接同樣的 Pencil Pro 跟巧控鍵盤，速度也只跟 Pro 差一點點，但價格便宜了好幾千塊。TechRadar 這幾天又把它選為最多人該買的平板，我完全同意。M4 配 12GB 記憶體，打遊戲、開分割視窗辦公、剪 4K 影片都不會卡，老實說大部分人根本碰不到它的天花板。iPad Pro M5 守在第二，是創作者的旗艦機。雙層 OLED Ultra Retina XDR 螢幕加上 Thunderbolt 埠，讓它真的能當隨身剪片繪圖工作站，假如你每天狂操 Final Cut 或 Procreate，這個價差就值得。第三名 Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 還是 Android 陣營最強。14.6 吋 AMOLED 是這份榜單裡看了最爽的螢幕，S Pen 直接附盒裝，DeX 桌面模式拿來處理試算表跟收信，真的能取代筆電。第四名 OnePlus Pad 3 是我一直在推的性價比代表。Snapdragon 8 Elite 配 13.2 吋 144Hz 螢幕，還有 12,140mAh 大電池實測能撐超過 16 小時，旗艦的手感卻只要中階的價錢，這配置開這價真的很香。說真的，這次評測又印證我每輪都在講的一句話，選你本來就在用的生態系最不會後悔。家裡都蘋果就買 iPad，手機是三星就留在 Galaxy，不在乎牌子只想要硬體最猛的，OnePlus 給你最多。這週沒什麼大事足以動到名次，所以順序維持不變。

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 還是聰明人買的那一台
highlights.body: 它跟 Pro 共用 App、Pencil Pro 跟巧控鍵盤，價格卻便宜好幾千。M4 配 12GB 記憶體，遊戲、多工、剪 4K 都順，大多數人根本用不到極限。

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 的價差，創作者付得心甘情願
highlights.body: 雙層 OLED Ultra Retina XDR 螢幕加 Thunderbolt，讓它變成真正的隨身剪片繪圖機。每天泡在 Final Cut 或 Procreate 的人，多花的錢賺得回來。

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 是 Android 平板的天花板
highlights.body: 14.6 吋 AMOLED 是這裡最沉浸的螢幕，S Pen 直接附，DeX 桌面模式拿來打試算表收信真的能代替筆電。

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 用中階價給你旗艦手感
highlights.body: Snapdragon 8 Elite、13.2 吋 144Hz 螢幕，加上 12,140mAh 電池實測撐超過 16 小時，比大牌便宜好幾千卻給你旗艦硬體。

highlights.title: 挑你原本就在用的生態系就對了
highlights.body: 家裡都蘋果就買 iPad，手機三星就留 Galaxy，只想要硬體最猛又不在乎牌子的人，OnePlus 給你最多。這個邏輯讓名次這週穩穩不動。

references.title: The best tablet 2026: the best iPad and Android tablets
We've tested the best tablets in 2026 for all budgets and uses
10 Best Tablets of 2026, Tested by Our Experts

en.commentary:
The board does not move today, and the reason is that the only real near-term story is the Galaxy Tab S12 Plus, which Samsung is expected to launch later this year rather than now. Until that ships, the field stands. The iPad Air M4 keeps number one because it is still the tablet that fits the most people. The M4 chip with 12GB of RAM handles gaming and video editing without flinching, iPadOS remains the most polished tablet software, and it costs far less than the Pro. For anyone who wants a do-everything tablet without paying flagship money, this is the buy.

The iPad Pro M5 holds second as the raw-power and display king for pros who genuinely use it, and the Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra stays third as the best Android slate, its 14.6-inch AMOLED panel still the closest a tablet gets to a laptop screen. The OnePlus Pad 3 keeps fourth on the strength of value, a 144Hz display, and battery life that outlasts the pricier Android options. The mid-board holds too: iPad mini for one-hand portability, the standard iPad A16 at seventh as the budget gateway into iPadOS. The read for today: most buyers should get the iPad Air, power users the Pro, Android fans the Tab S11 Ultra or the value-leading OnePlus Pad 3. If you can wait, the Tab S12 Plus is the one new arrival worth watching, but it is not here yet.

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 holds number one as the tablet for the most people
highlights.body: The M4 chip paired with 12GB of RAM chews through gaming and video editing, iPadOS stays the most polished tablet software, and the price sits well below the Pro. With no new release shipping to challenge it this week, it remains the do-everything pick that most buyers should choose first.

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 stays the power and display king for pros who use it
highlights.body: For video editors, illustrators and anyone who pushes a tablet like a workstation, the M5 chip and the tandem OLED display are still unmatched. It holds second because that ceiling is real, and the only people who should pay the premium are the ones who will actually use the headroom.

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra is the Android tablet that feels like a laptop
highlights.body: Its 14.6-inch 2.9K AMOLED panel is the closest any tablet gets to a real laptop screen, and the raw specs lead the Android field. It stays third as the premium Android pick, the slate to choose if you want the biggest, best display outside the Apple ecosystem.

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 keeps fourth on value the flagships cannot match
highlights.body: A 144Hz display that draws faster than pricier rivals, battery life that outlasts the Galaxy options, and a price that undercuts the premium tier keep it the value champion. For an Android tablet that does most of what the flagships do for less, it earns its spot.

zh-tw.commentary:
今天榜單不動，原因是近期唯一真正的故事是 Galaxy Tab S12 Plus，三星預計今年稍晚才推出，不是現在。在它上市前，戰局維持原樣。iPad Air M4 守第一，因為它還是最適合大多數人的平板。M4 晶片配 12GB RAM 打遊戲、剪影片都不會卡，iPadOS 還是最完整成熟的平板系統，價格又比 Pro 親民一大截。想要一台什麼都能做、又不用付旗艦價的平板，就是它。

iPad Pro M5 守第二，是真的會用到的專業人士的純效能和螢幕王者。Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 守第三，是最強 Android 平板，14.6 吋 AMOLED 面板還是平板裡最接近筆電螢幕的。OnePlus Pad 3 守第四，靠的是 CP 值、144Hz 螢幕，加上比貴桑桑的 Android 對手更持久的續航。中段也穩：iPad mini 主打單手好攜帶，標準版 iPad A16 排第七，是進入 iPadOS 的入門口。今天的判斷：多數人買 iPad Air，重度使用者買 Pro，Android 派買 Tab S11 Ultra 或 CP 值最高的 OnePlus Pad 3。等得起的話，Tab S12 Plus 是唯一值得盯的新品，但它還沒到。

highlights.title: iPad Air M4 守第一，是最適合多數人的平板
highlights.body: M4 晶片配 12GB RAM 打遊戲剪片都游刃有餘，iPadOS 還是最完整的平板系統，價格又遠低於 Pro。這週沒有新品上市來挑戰它，它還是那台多數人該優先選的全能平板。

highlights.title: iPad Pro M5 是真的用得到的專業人士的效能螢幕王者
highlights.body: 對剪影片、畫圖、把平板當工作站操的人，M5 晶片加雙層 OLED 螢幕還是無人能敵。它守第二是因為這個天花板是真的，會用到這份餘裕的人才該付這個溢價。

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 是用起來像筆電的 Android 平板
highlights.body: 14.6 吋 2.9K AMOLED 面板是平板裡最接近真筆電螢幕的，純規格也領先 Android 陣營。它守第三，是高階 Android 首選，蘋果生態外想要最大最好螢幕就選它。

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 靠旗艦比不了的 CP 值守第四
highlights.body: 144Hz 螢幕畫得比貴的對手還快，續航贏過 Galaxy 系列，價格又卡在高階之下，讓它穩坐 CP 值王者。想要一台用更少錢做到旗艦大部分事情的 Android 平板，它實至名歸。

references.title: The best tablet 2026: the best iPad and Android tablets
Best Tablet 2026: iPads & Android Tablets Reviewed & Ranked
10 Best Tablets of 2026, Tested by Our Experts

en.commentary: The M4 iPad Air stays my pick for most people, and TechRadar landing on the same conclusion this week only reinforces it. You get genuinely desktop-class silicon, the best tablet software on the market in iPadOS, and a premium chassis, all for hundreds less than the Pro. For browsing, drawing, note-taking, and light editing the Air leaves almost nothing on the table, which is exactly why its value score sits so high. The M5 iPad Pro holds second because it is the most capable tablet ever built, with a tandem OLED display and silicon that chews through 4K timelines, but you pay dearly for headroom most people never touch. The Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra stays third as the Android answer to the Pro, a 14.6 inch slab that doubles as a laptop replacement through DeX, with the best stylus experience outside Apple. The OnePlus Pad 3 remains the value-forward Android pick at four, pairing a top-tier processor with the longest battery life in the upper bracket and the clever Open Canvas multitasking. Apple's A16 iPad still anchors the budget tier at seven by offering more polish than any cheap Android slate. Nothing launched this week to reshuffle the board. The M4 Air remains the sweet spot, and the order reflects how little has changed at the top.

highlights.title: M4 iPad Air is the sweet spot
highlights.body: Desktop-class performance, the best tablet software anywhere, and a premium build for hundreds less than the Pro. TechRadar reached the same verdict this week.

highlights.title: M5 iPad Pro is overkill done right
highlights.body: Tandem OLED and silicon that eats 4K timelines make it the most capable tablet ever. Most buyers will never tap the headroom they are paying for.

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra leads Android
highlights.body: A 14.6 inch screen plus DeX turns it into a real laptop stand-in, and the S Pen is the best stylus outside Apple's ecosystem.

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 wins on endurance
highlights.body: A flagship processor, the longest battery life in the upper tier, and Open Canvas multitasking at a price that undercuts the big names.

zh-tw.commentary: M4 iPad Air 還是我給一般人的首選，TechRadar 這週也得出同樣結論，等於再幫它背書一次。你拿到的是真正桌機等級的晶片，市面上最好的平板系統 iPadOS，還有質感機身，價格卻比 Pro 便宜好幾千。瀏覽、畫圖、做筆記、輕度剪輯，Air 幾乎什麼都能扛，這就是它 CP 值分數這麼高的原因。M5 iPad Pro 維持第二，因為它是史上最強的平板，雙層 OLED 螢幕加上能輕鬆吃下 4K 時間軸的晶片，只是你要為大多數人根本用不到的效能付出高價。Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 排第三，是 Android 陣營對 Pro 的回應，14.6 吋的大尺寸透過 DeX 能當筆電替身，手寫筆體驗也是蘋果以外最好的。OnePlus Pad 3 維持第四，是 Android 主打 CP 值的選擇，頂級處理器配上上半段最長的續航，加上聰明的 Open Canvas 多工。蘋果 A16 iPad 還是穩坐第七的入門代表，比任何便宜的 Android 平板都更精緻。這週沒有新機足以洗牌。M4 Air 還是甜蜜點，排名也反映出前段班幾乎沒什麼變動。

highlights.title: M4 iPad Air 是甜蜜點
highlights.body: 桌機等級效能、最好的平板系統、質感機身，價格卻比 Pro 便宜好幾千。TechRadar 這週也是同樣結論。

highlights.title: M5 iPad Pro 是高級的過度規格
highlights.body: 雙層 OLED 加上能吃 4K 時間軸的晶片，史上最強平板。只是多數人永遠用不到你花錢買的那些餘裕。

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 領軍 Android
highlights.body: 14.6 吋螢幕配 DeX 真的能當筆電替身，S Pen 也是蘋果生態以外最好的手寫筆。

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 靠續航取勝
highlights.body: 旗艦處理器、上半段最長的續航、加上 Open Canvas 多工，價格還壓過大牌。

en.commentary: The M4 iPad Air stays my pick for most people, and the major review houses landing on the same verdict this week only reinforces it. You get genuinely desktop-class silicon, the best tablet software anywhere in iPadOS, and a premium chassis, all for hundreds less than the Pro. For browsing, drawing, note-taking, and light editing the Air leaves almost nothing on the table, which is why its value score sits so high. The M5 iPad Pro holds second as the most capable tablet ever built, with a tandem OLED panel and silicon that tears through 4K timelines, though you pay dearly for headroom most people never touch. The Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra stays third as the Android answer to the Pro, a 14.6 inch slab that doubles as a laptop through DeX, with the best stylus experience outside Apple. The OnePlus Pad 3 remains the value-forward Android pick at four, pairing a top-tier processor with the longest battery life in the upper bracket and the clever Open Canvas multitasking. Reviewers this week noted that the next OnePlus tablet is on the horizon with Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 silicon, but it is not shipping yet, so it does not change the board. Apple's A16 iPad still anchors the budget tier at seven by offering more polish than any cheap Android slate. Nothing launched this week to reshuffle the order, so the M4 Air keeps the sweet spot and I only fine-tuned a couple of scores.

highlights.title: The M4 iPad Air is the sweet spot for almost everyone
highlights.body: Desktop-class silicon, the polish of iPadOS, and a premium build for hundreds less than the Pro. For browsing, sketching, and note-taking it gives up almost nothing to the flagship, which is why its value score leads the entire field.

highlights.title: The M5 iPad Pro is the most capable tablet ever made
highlights.body: A tandem OLED display and silicon that chews through 4K timelines put it in a class of its own for creative pros. The only knock is that most buyers never tap the headroom they are paying for, which keeps it at second.

highlights.title: The Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra is the Android laptop replacement
highlights.body: Its 14.6 inch screen and DeX desktop mode make it the closest thing to a laptop in tablet form, and the bundled S Pen is the best stylus experience outside Apple. For Android power users it is the clear flagship.

highlights.title: The OnePlus Pad 3 is the value-forward Android pick
highlights.body: It pairs a top-tier processor with the longest battery life in the upper bracket and clever Open Canvas multitasking. With a strong display and a sharp price, it delivers flagship feel without the flagship outlay.

zh-tw.commentary: M4 iPad Air 這週還是我給大多數人的首選，幾家大媒體這週也得出一樣的結論，更印證了這點。它給你真正桌機等級的晶片、市面上最好的平板系統 iPadOS、加上高質感機身，卻比 Pro 便宜好幾千。瀏覽、畫圖、做筆記、輕度剪輯，Air 幾乎都不打折扣，所以它的 value 分數這麼高。M5 iPad Pro 排第二，是史上最強的平板，雙層 OLED 螢幕加上能輾過 4K 時間軸的晶片，只是你得花大錢買一堆大多數人用不到的餘裕。Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 第三，是 Android 對應 Pro 的答案，14.6 吋大板透過 DeX 可以當筆電用，觸控筆體驗是 Apple 以外最好的。OnePlus Pad 3 維持第四，是高 CP 值的 Android 選擇，旗艦處理器配上上半段最長的續航，還有聰明的 Open Canvas 多工。媒體這週提到下一代 OnePlus 平板要來了，會搭 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5，但還沒出貨，所以不影響榜單。Apple 的 A16 iPad 還是用比任何便宜 Android 板更精緻的體驗，穩坐第七的入門位置。這週沒有新機改變局勢，所以 M4 Air 保住甜蜜點，我只微調了一兩個分數。

highlights.title: M4 iPad Air 是幾乎所有人的甜蜜點
highlights.body: 桌機等級晶片、iPadOS 的細膩體驗、高質感機身，卻比 Pro 便宜好幾千。瀏覽、畫圖、做筆記幾乎不輸旗艦，所以它的 value 分數全場最高。

highlights.title: M5 iPad Pro 是史上最強平板
highlights.body: 雙層 OLED 加上輾過 4K 時間軸的晶片，對創作專業者來說自成一級。唯一的扣分是多數人買了卻用不到那些餘裕，所以它停在第二。

highlights.title: Galaxy Tab S11 Ultra 是 Android 筆電替代品
highlights.body: 14.6 吋大螢幕加 DeX 桌面模式，是平板裡最接近筆電的存在，附的 S Pen 也是 Apple 以外最好的觸控筆。Android 重度用戶的旗艦首選。

highlights.title: OnePlus Pad 3 是高 CP 值的 Android 之選
highlights.body: 旗艦處理器配上上半段最長的續航，加上聰明的 Open Canvas 多工。螢幕夠好、價格漂亮，給你旗艦的感覺卻不用花旗艦的錢。
